title: Front Office Manager - Elior India International Enterprises - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Elior India International Enterprises - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Elior India International Enterprises in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Elior India International Enterprises:
Elior India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Elior India International Enterprises!
